vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:claude-opus-4-8
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-2155: Decompose chat/MessagesTimeline.tsx (1620 lines) into focused submodules behind a thin barrel — behavior-preserving.

narratives.Problem: src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/chat/MessagesTimeline.tsx is 1620 lines — baselined at 1620 in scripts/file-size-baseline.txt and over the 1000-line file-size guard ceiling. It mixes cohesive concerns in one file: 3 module constants (45-47), time/duration formatters (formatTimestamp 151, formatElapsed 169), search-highlight DOM utilities (49-148), the exported types RoundMarker (189) + MessagesTimelineProps (198), the virtualized container component MessagesTimeline (229-852), the per-row dispatcher TimelineRowRenderer (854-903), the message-row renderers (905-1100), the work-log tool renderers (1101-1449), and the divider/indicator components (1450-1620). A sibling MessagesTimeline.logic.ts already holds the data-transform layer and is out of scope.
narratives.Proposal: Pure relocation behind a barrel. Extract cohesive groups into a new sibling directory src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/chat/messagesTimeline/ (camelCase; does not collide with the uppercase MessagesTimeline.tsx barrel on this case-sensitive filesystem), and leave chat/MessagesTimeline.tsx as a thin re-export barrel that still exports MessagesTimeline (value), RoundMarker (type), and MessagesTimelineProps (type). Modules: types.ts, helpers.ts, messageRows.tsx, workLogRows.tsx, dividers.tsx, TimelineRowRenderer.tsx, MessagesTimeline.tsx (component). Dependency order types/helpers -> messageRows/workLogRows/dividers -> TimelineRowRenderer -> component -> barrel; no cycles. RoundMarker lives in types.ts so dividers.tsx can use it without a cycle back to the component. Three seams (work items) in a linear blocks chain because all three edit chat/MessagesTimeline.tsx. Each seam ends with the FULL frontend-aware gate set green. No logic edits, no renamed exports, no call-site changes, no any introduced. Requirements: FR-1 barrel keeps the public surface; FR-2 every internal symbol relocated per the layout with no cycle; FR-3 zero call-site changes (TerminalPanel.tsx, ConversationPanel.tsx, CommandDeck/SessionView/SessionPanel.tsx, lib/deriveRoundMarkers.ts, all __tests__); FR-4 pure relocation (byte-for-byte moves + added imports only); NFR-1 each new file < 1000 lines and lint:file-size exits 0; NFR-2 any-ratchet green with no allowlist edit; NFR-3 the 4-part gate set green after each seam; NFR-4 no edit to scripts/file-size-baseline.txt or MessagesTimeline.logic.ts. GATE SET (after every seam — the issue's root-only checklist is INSUFFICIENT because root typecheck excludes src/dashboard/** and root vitest excludes src/dashboard/frontend/**): (1) npm run lint; (2) npx tsc --noEmit run from src/dashboard/frontend/; (3) npm --prefix src/dashboard/frontend run test (0 failed) — the behavior proof; (4) npm run typecheck && npx vitest run --configLoader runner.
narratives.NonGoals: No logic edits, no renamed or removed exports, no behavior change of any kind (pure moves + re-exports). Do NOT move or modify MessagesTimeline.logic.ts. No changes to any importing call site (TerminalPanel.tsx, ConversationPanel.tsx, CommandDeck/SessionView/SessionPanel.tsx, lib/deriveRoundMarkers.ts, the tests). No new tests and no test-behavior changes. No eslint-any-allowlist.json edit (the file has no any). No scripts/file-size-baseline.txt edit (the shrunk barrel passes against its 1620 baseline; matches the PAN-2150 convention). No re-architecture of virtualization, search, rounds, or any feature — relocation only.

items.title: WI-1: Extract shared types and pure helpers into messagesTimeline/types.ts and messagesTimeline/helpers.ts

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/chat/messagesTimeline/types.ts and move RoundMarker (MessagesTimeline.tsx:189-196) and MessagesTimelineProps (:198-225) verbatim, with their type-only imports (ChatMessage/CompactBoundary/ProposedPlan/TurnDiffSummary/WorkLogEntry from chat-types, WorkingPhase from lib/workingPhase, FailedMessage from ConversationPanel, RoundVerdict from CommandDeck/RoundCard) repathed for the deeper directory (e.g. '../../lib/workingPhase' -> '../../../lib/workingPhase', './chat-types' -> '../chat-types'). Create messagesTimeline/helpers.ts and move the 3 constants (:45-47), formatTimestamp (:151-166), formatElapsed (:169-177), stringifyToolInput (:49-56), escapeRegex (:58-60), extractSearchHighlightTerms (:62-69), SEARCH_HIGHLIGHT_CLASS/ATTR (:72-73), escapeDataAttributeValue (:75-79), clearSearchHighlights (:81-86), highlightSearchTermsInElement (:88-126), and getRowSearchText (:128-148); helpers.ts imports the MessagesTimelineRow type from '../MessagesTimeline.logic'. Update chat/MessagesTimeline.tsx to import all moved symbols back from './messagesTimeline/types' and './messagesTimeline/helpers', and add `export type { RoundMarker, MessagesTimelineProps } from './messagesTimeline/types'` so external `import type { RoundMarker } from '.../MessagesTimeline'` keeps resolving. Pure move — no logic edits.

items.title: Given the moved types and helpers, when `npx tsc --noEmit` runs from src/dashboard/frontend/, then chat/MessagesTimeline.tsx compiles importing RoundMarker, MessagesTimelineProps, the 3 constants, and every helper from the two new modules with no type errors.

Given the new re-export, when lib/deriveRoundMarkers.ts and CommandDeck/SessionView/SessionPanel.tsx are typechecked, then `import type { RoundMarker } from '.../MessagesTimeline'` still resolves unchanged with no importer edited.

Given the seam, when `npm run lint`, `npm --prefix src/dashboard/frontend run test`, and `npm run typecheck && npx vitest run --configLoader runner` all run, then every gate passes with 0 failures and the any-ratchet stays green with no eslint-any-allowlist.json edit.
Given types.ts and helpers.ts, when `wc -l` runs on each, then each is under 1000 lines.
WI-2: Extract leaf row and divider components into messagesTimeline/messageRows.tsx, workLogRows.tsx, and dividers.tsx

narrative.Action: Create messagesTimeline/messageRows.tsx and move isSummaryForkMessage (:905-908), isReviewerContextMessage (:910-915), parseSlashCommandMessage (:917-920), UserMessageRow (:922-958), ContextMessageBlock (:960-986), ReviewerContextBlock (:988-1013), and AssistantMessageRow (:1015-1100); it imports formatTimestamp/formatElapsed from './helpers' and ChatMarkdown/ChangedFilesTree/DiffStatLabel/summarizeTurnDiffStats with repathed relatives. Create messagesTimeline/workLogRows.tsx and move WorkLogGroup (:1101-1160), TERMINAL_TOOLS (:1161), WORK_LOG_DETAIL_MAX (:1162), asString (:1164-1166), firstLine (:1168-1171), getWorkLogDisplayDetail (:1173-1183), ToolUseExpanded (:1185-1363), and SimpleWorkEntryRow (:1364-1449); it imports MAX_VISIBLE_WORK_LOG_ENTRIES from './helpers'. Create messagesTimeline/dividers.tsx and move WorkingIndicator (:1450-1482), ROUND_VERDICT_COLOR/LABEL (:1483-1496), RoundDivider (:1497-1551), SessionPermissionsRow (:1552-1570), SlashCommandDivider (:1571-1588), CompactBoundaryDivider (:1589-1612), and CompactingIndicator (:1613-1620); it imports formatTimestamp from './helpers', RoundMarker from './types', and the command-deck styles module with a repathed relative. Update chat/MessagesTimeline.tsx so TimelineRowRenderer (still in chat/MessagesTimeline.tsx at this point) and the main component import these components from the three new modules. Pure move — no logic edits, no renamed exports.

items.title: Given the three new module files, when `npx tsc --noEmit` runs from src/dashboard/frontend/ and `npm run typecheck && npx vitest run --configLoader runner` runs at root, then all pass with 0 failures (no import cycle, all relative paths resolve).

Given the moved renderers, when `npm --prefix src/dashboard/frontend run test` runs, then MessagesTimeline.test.tsx (search highlighting, round-marker injection, Pi harness tool entries) and ConversationPanel.test.tsx pass with 0 failures, proving rendered output is unchanged.
Given messageRows.tsx, workLogRows.tsx, and dividers.tsx, when `npm run lint` runs, then it exits 0 and the file-size guard reports each new file under 1000 lines.
WI-3: Move TimelineRowRenderer + the MessagesTimeline component into messagesTimeline/ and reduce chat/MessagesTimeline.tsx to a thin barrel

narrative.Action: Create messagesTimeline/TimelineRowRenderer.tsx and move RowProps (:854-866) and TimelineRowRenderer (:867-903); it imports messageRows/workLogRows/dividers from './...', types from './types', and PlanCard with a repathed relative. Create messagesTimeline/MessagesTimeline.tsx and move the MessagesTimeline component (:227-852, including the ALWAYS_UNVIRTUALIZED_TAIL_ROWS/AUTO_SCROLL_THRESHOLD_PX usages which import from './helpers'); it imports helpers, types, TimelineRowRenderer, RoundDivider from './dividers', ChatMarkdownSettingsProvider/ChatMarkdown, useVirtualizer, and the MessagesTimeline.logic helpers from '../MessagesTimeline.logic'. Reduce chat/MessagesTimeline.tsx to a thin barrel containing only a top file comment, `export { MessagesTimeline } from './messagesTimeline/MessagesTimeline'`, and `export type { RoundMarker, MessagesTimelineProps } from './messagesTimeline/types'`. Do NOT edit scripts/file-size-baseline.txt (the shrunk barrel passes against its 1620 baseline) and do NOT touch MessagesTimeline.logic.ts.

items.title: Given the thin barrel, when the 5 importers (TerminalPanel.tsx, ConversationPanel.tsx, CommandDeck/SessionView/SessionPanel.tsx, lib/deriveRoundMarkers.ts, __tests__/MessagesTimeline.test.tsx) are typechecked, then each resolves MessagesTimeline / RoundMarker / MessagesTimelineProps unchanged with no importer edit.

Given the completed refactor, when `wc -l` runs on chat/MessagesTimeline.tsx and on every file under chat/messagesTimeline/, then the barrel is materially smaller than 1620 (a few lines) and each new module is under 1000 lines, and `npm run lint:file-size` exits 0.

Given the full gate set, when `npm run lint`, `npx tsc --noEmit` (in src/dashboard/frontend), `npm --prefix src/dashboard/frontend run test`, and `npm run typecheck && npx vitest run --configLoader runner` all run, then every gate passes with 0 failures.

Given the cumulative diff, when reviewed, then it is pure relocation: no logic edits, no renamed or removed exports, MessagesTimeline.logic.ts untouched, scripts/file-size-baseline.txt untouched, and eslint-any-allowlist.json untouched.
